articles.content: June 19 (Reuters) - Commonwealth Bank of Australia named Victoria Ledda as group chief information officer and Rodrigo Castillo as group chief technology officer on Friday as the lender sharpens its focus on digital, data and artificial intelligence ... [1310 chars]

articles.title: SpaceX’s epic fundraising campaign for AI has only just begun
articles.description: SpaceX is already turning to the bond market and is preparing to seek at least US$20 billion in its first deal. Read more at straitstimes.com.
articles.content:
NEW YORK - When Elon Musk went into sales pitch mode ahead of the SpaceX IPO, the comparison he marshaled to justify valuing the company in the trillions of dollars, and tapping investors for tens of billions, raised a few eyebrows.

articles.title: Why Alphabet Raised $84.75 Billion In Stock For Its AI Build-Out
articles.description: While Nvidia, Meta and Oracle fund the AI build-out with bonds, Google's parent reached for equity, the largest such raise in U.S. corporate history. A $10 billion cheque from Berkshire Hathaway tells you who was convinced.
articles.content: Companies that mint cash do not usually pass the hat. Alphabet, which ended its first quarter with about $127 billion in cash and marketable securities, has just done so anyway. On June 1 it announced equity offerings totalling $80 billion, then upsi... [3521 chars]

articles.title: Reliance Industries AGM 2026: Five key things investors will watch for
articles.description: Investors and market participants will keenly be awaiting fresh details on the listing of the telecom arm, progress on the new energy firm, and watch for any update on the company’s plans in the area of artificial intelligence (AI).
articles.content: Oil-to-telecom conglomerate Reliance Industries' 49th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held later today, on June 19. Investors and market participants will keenly be awaiting fresh details on the listing of the telecom arm, progress on the new en... [3407 chars]

articles.title: Sanders bills AI firms for $7T fund, aims $1,000 citizen payments
articles.description: Sanders wants AI companies to help fund annual $1,000 payments for Americans through a proposed $7 trillion sovereign wealth fund.
articles.content: Sanders argues that today’s AI systems rely heavily on content, knowledge, and creative works produced by generations of people. Because AI companies benefit from that collective human output, he says the public should share in the industry’s financi... [2709 chars]

articles.title: LA’s 911 dispatch system may get relief from AI-powered call handling
articles.description: Aurelian, a Florida firm, says its AI call-taker can ease LA’s 911 overload by handling nonemergency complaints and routing them to the proper channels amid staffing shortages.
articles.content:
A Florida tech firm says it can help pull Los Angeles’ overloaded 911 system back from the brink by letting artificial intelligence handle routine complaints.
Public safety technology company Aurelian has developed an AI-powered call taker that answe... [4150 chars]

articles.title: Trupeer AI Appoints Former UiPath APAC President & CEO Raghu Subramanian to Accelerate Australian Enterprise Growth
articles.description: **media[1105523]**SYDNEY, June 19, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Trupeer AI, the workflow knowledge layer for teams and AI agents, today announced the appointment of Raghu Subramanian as President and Chief Business Officer as the company accelerates its expansion in Australia, a high-readiness enterprise technology market where advanced AI adoption is outpacing the knowledge infrastructure needed to support it. Backed by RTP Global, Salesforce Ventures and trusted by more than 50,000 teams in over 100 countries and over 120 languages, Trupeer is strengthening its leadership team to scale adoption across Australian enterprises, technology-led organisations.**media[1105524]**
articles.content: SYDNEY, June 19, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Trupeer AI, the workflow knowledge layer for teams and AI agents, today announced the appointment of Raghu Subramanian as President and Chief Business Officer as the company accelerates its expansion in Australia... [4613 chars]

articles.title: Anthropic's Claude Code Artifacts update brings live, shared dashboards and interactive workspaces to enterprises
articles.description: By turning the terminal into a live, collaborative canvas, Anthropic is proving that the most valuable output of an AI coding assistant isn't just the code itself—it is the context, the reasoning, and the ability to share that work instantly.
articles.content:
Anthropic announced a potentially game-changing new feature for users of Claude Code on the Claude Team and Enterprise subscription plans: Artifacts.
This update turns a Claude Code session's work into a live, interactive, and shareable, custom HTML ... [8414 chars]

articles.title: AI Data Center Bonds Are Being Priced As Project Finance At Last
articles.description: For two years, a hyperscaler's name on the lease was enough to make a data-centre bond trade like the tenant's own debt. Citi says that shortcut is breaking down, and a Microsoft-linked bond shows where.
articles.content: There is an old rule in lending that a name on the door is worth less than a claim on the cash. Bond investors who spent two years buying data-centre debt on the strength of the tenant rather than the structure are now relearning it. In a note on Jun... [3928 chars]
